channel.title: azure spring cloud on Abhishek's blog
channel.description: Recent content in azure spring cloud on Abhishek's blog

item.title: Extracting Value from IoT Using Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Synapse Analytics, and Confluent Cloud
item.description: It’s possible to build seamless device-to-cloud experience with the integrations between Azure and Confluent Cloud. The example provided in this blog post showcases how the following capabilities of Azure and Confluent Cloud are leveraged:

item.title: Real-Time Search and Analytics with Confluent, Azure, Redis, and Spring Cloud
item.description: Self-managing a distributed system like Apache Kafka ®, along with building and operating Kafka connectors, is complex and resource intensive. It requires significant Kafka skills and expertise in the development and operations teams of your organization.
